Document:
[color=#897236][mono]──── [color=#FFA500][bold]CONTRABAND LIST[/bold][/color] ───────────────────────────────[/mono][/color]
[bolditalic]This page defines each type of item restricted by contraband laws. See [textlink="main page" link="SectorLaw"] for class definitions.[/bolditalic]
The lists of examples are not exclusive. They include, but are not limited to the examples given.
[color=green][bold]Class 1[/bold][/color] - Any standard semi-automatic or fully-automatic firearm. (laser weapons, plasma weapons, stun batons, protokinetic weapons, etc.) - Any standard melee weapon, makeshift or otherwise. (energy swords, knives, makeshift blades, etc.) - Any ship-mounted weapon not covered by higher restrictions.
[color=yellow][bold]Class 2[/bold][/color] - Hacking devices. (authentication disruptors, cryptographic sequencers, etc.) - Ship-mounted EMP cannons. (TARNYX, RUBICON, etc.) - Any TDF gear or weapons. (TA-21 hardsuits, TDF MR-8T, TDF energy sword, etc.) - Powerful sedatives or extremely toxic chemicals (nocturine, lexorin)
[color=red][bold]Class 3[/bold][/color] - WMDs (nuclear fission explosives, thermonuclear weapons, dirty bombs, extremely powerful atmospheric bombs) - Hardbombs (syndicate bomb) - Smuggled Goods (unauthorized cargo such as SD, TIC, or Syndicate weapon/equipment caches) - Chemical and biological weapons (letoferol) - Chimera biomass
